title: selaginella calcicola
intro: Selaginella calcicola, a type of evergreen, perennial plant in the Selaginella genus, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Pacific Islands, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella calcicola include the potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
